title: Language Change  - Tab when the internet is off
scenario: When offline, tapping the Language tab shows a greyed-out interface and displays an "internet required" dialog on tap.
steps: Observe the tab content is greyed out
Observe the dialog: 'Feature unavailable. An internet connection is required to access this feature.' with an 'Ok got it' button
Observe the dialog closes and returns to the greyed-out state
expected: The Language tab content is greyed out. Tapping inside shows a dialog: "Feature unavailable. An internet connection is required to access this feature." with an "Ok got it" button. Tapping the button closes the dialog and returns to the greyed-out state.
